name: Zack Lee || Tattoo Artist
description:
Strike us like matches,
'cause everyone deserves the flames.



You're his favorite tattoo artist

♡23k special♡

No matter how chaotic things get on tour,

whenever Ashes swings through your city Zack always makes time to get tattooed by you.

Because you're his favorite artist

And he'll pay whatever it costs to keep your books open for a private session.

After all--

He likes having you all to himself~


Another day, another milestone. I can't believe we're here again at 23k. Thank you all so much for joining me here and enjoying my stories. I am still jetlagged from Japan but I dove right into working on this bot seeing I'd hit another milestone.

As promised, the next milestone is Zack's and he's my first full Scripts bot!

That's right! I was lucky enough to get added into the scripts alpha testing. And I know you all might have questions on what that entails so without further ado!


☆What Are Scripts?

Scripts are Janitor's version of a Lorebook but with more enhanced capabilities.

☆What is a Lorebook?

Think of a lorebook sort of like a dictionary. It holds all the info creator's usually have to store in the bot card in a secondary location. The info is only sent with the prompt when needed which means less permanent tokens in the bot but more detailed bots!

☆How do Scripts work?

Each entry has trigger words that activate that part of the knowledge base. For example if you bring up the fact Zack has an Australian Accent, that will trigger the entries on his accent and that he lived in Australia from ages 3-13.

☆How do I trigger something?

Simply roleplay with the bot! I've tried to cover all possible keywords for the various triggers. Want to spark Zack's NSFW coding? Words like 'horny', 'blush' and 'aroused' (plus more) will trigger his NSFW entry.

☆Why does Zack have so many less tokens than his original bot? Is he less detailed now?

Zack is actually even more detailed now! Instead of having to place all those tokens in his permanent memory and be sent to the LLM every single time you reply to the bot, only entries that are triggered will be sent.

This means less overall tokens are used freeing up more memory for you.

It also means I can place all the Ashes boys as NPCs with their actual personality and appearance builds. No more LLM giving Mikey dark curly hair (hopefully, this is still in alpha testing!)

☆What does each book do?

Ashes of Our Youth - Zack Lee

This book contains all of Zack's unique background info and NSFW traits, as well as general Ashes info.

Ashes of Our Youth - Zack NPCs

This book contains the personalities for the Ashes' boys if you end up bringing an NPC into the scene.

☆Will you be updating y
